_comment: n8n-readable reference mirror of app/src/utils/mediaMode.js. The JS utility is the canonical source of truth for media mode definitions, validation logic, and provider capabilities. Set MEDIA_MODE in n8n variables to switch modes at runtime.

image_video.description: Image-based video. Generates still images via an image provider and TTS narration, then assembles them into a video. Default v1 strategy — cheaper and more reliable.

full_video.description: Full AI-generated video. Requires a provider with native video generation capability. Not yet supported by any v1 provider. Reserved for future use.

providerCapabilities._comment: Which media capabilities each AI provider supports. Used to validate MEDIA_MODE against AI_PROVIDER at startup.
